import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { updateSeo } from '../../utils/seoHelper'; import styles from './Home.module.css'; import { FaCode, FaRocket, FaShieldAlt, FaCheckCircle, FaLaptopCode, FaChartLine, FaUsers } from 'react-icons/fa'; function Home() { const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { updateSeo({ title: 'Kognivex | Engineering Scalable Digital Future', description: 'Custom web apps, SaaS platforms, and enterprise solutions built for the modern era. We combine elite engineering with premium design.', }); }, []); return (
{/* HERO SECTION */}

Elite Engineering for Your Digital Ambition

We build high-performance SaaS platforms, custom enterprise systems, and scalable web applications that drive real business growth.

{/* FEATURES GRID */}

Why Partners Choose Kognivex

We combine deep technical expertise with a relentless focus on business outcomes.

Modern Stack

We use the most reliable and scalable technologies to ensure your product is future-proof and performant.

Elite Security

Enterprise-grade security is baked into every line of code we write, from authentication to data storage.

Rapid Deployment

Our agile workflow ensures that you go from concept to production faster without compromising on quality.

{/* CONTENT LAYOUT SECTION */}

Scale Your Business with Custom Solutions

Off-the-shelf software often fails to meet the unique needs of a growing enterprise. At Kognivex, we specialize in building bespoke systems that integrate seamlessly with your workflow.

Whether it's a complex SaaS architecture or a high-traffic e-commerce hub, our team ensures every pixel and every byte serves your strategic goals.

Elite Software Standards

  • Performance Optimized Architectures
  • Intuitive User Experience Design
  • Seamless API & Cloud Integrations
  • 24/7 Technical Support & Maintenance
  • Data-Driven Product Strategy
{/* STATS SECTION */}

50+

Products Launched

99.9%

Uptime Guaranteed

15+

Industry Partners

{/* CTA SECTION */}

Ready to Build Something Great?

Contact our engineering team today for a free consultation and project roadmap.

); } export default Home;
